name: Moury Construct SA
summary: Moury Construct SA constructs and renovates residential and non-residential buildings for private and public markets in Belgium. The company undertakes public and private buildings, commercial surfaces, halls of structures, renovation and restoration, and industries and services projects. It is also involved in general joinery, and thermal and acoustic insulations; metal and aluminum joinery; prefabrication of concrete elements; and property development activities. Moury Construct SA was founded in 1920 and is based in Li√É¬®ge, Belgium.
